skills.name: smart_classroom_audio_summary
skills.description: Transcribe classroom audio and generate a Markdown summary using Smart Classroom. Invokes the existing Pipeline directly (no FastAPI server required).

audio_file.description: Path to an audio file accessible to Smart Classroom (e.g. /data/lecture.wav).

audio_filename.description: Filename of audio already staged under the project storage directory (e.g. uploaded via /upload-audio).

session_id.description: Optional existing Smart Classroom session id. A new one is created when omitted.

source_type.description: Audio source type. Only 'audio_file' is supported by the skill adapter.

include_transcript.description: When true, the full transcript text is included in the output.

session_id.description: The Smart Classroom session id used for this run. Pass to smart_classroom_mindmap to chain the skills.

summary_markdown.description: Full generated classroom summary in Markdown format. Pass to smart_classroom_mindmap as 'summary_markdown'.

transcription_events.description: Raw chunk-level transcription events emitted by the pipeline.

error_codes.AudioSummaryInputError: Invalid or missing input (e.g. no audio provided, file not found, unsupported source_type).
error_codes.RuntimeError: Pipeline initialisation, transcription, or summarisation failure.

environment_notes: ASR and LLM models must be available as configured in config.yaml.
ffmpeg must be installed and on PATH.
Set PYTHONPATH to include the smart-classroom root directory.
GPU or CPU device configuration is controlled by config.yaml.

skills.name: smart_classroom_mindmap
skills.description: Generate a jsMind-compatible JSON mind map from a Smart Classroom summary. Can be chained directly after smart_classroom_audio_summary.

session_id.description: Existing Smart Classroom session ID. When provided, reads summary.md from the session directory. Pass the 'session_id' returned by smart_classroom_audio_summary.

summary_markdown.description: Markdown summary text. Pass the 'summary_markdown' returned by smart_classroom_audio_summary. When provided, written to the session directory before calling the pipeline.

language.description: Language of the summary; controls which system prompt is used.

output_format.description: Requested output format. The LLM always produces jsMind JSON; 'raw' disables JSON parsing.

include_raw.description: When true, always include the raw LLM output string even if JSON parsing succeeded.

session_id.description: Smart Classroom session identifier used or created for this request.

mindmap.description: Parsed jsMind JSON object with 'meta', 'format', and 'data' keys. null when JSON parsing failed.

raw_mindmap.description: Raw LLM output string. Always present when 'mindmap' is null or 'include_raw' is true.

source.description: Indicates whether the summary was read from an existing session artifact or from the caller-supplied 'summary_markdown'.

error_codes.ValueError: Missing or invalid input (e.g. neither session_id nor summary_markdown provided).

environment_notes: LLM model must be available as configured in config.yaml.
The LLM prompt produces jsMind JSON (not Mermaid) as defined in config.yaml mindmap.system_prompt.
Set PYTHONPATH to include the smart-classroom root directory.
